hardConstraints.rule: MUST use/extend WealthCard component, NO new parallel card components
MUST use theme.colors.wealth.functional for semantic colors
MUST use React Native Animated API (NO reanimated)
Tab navigation structure MUST NOT change (5 tabs)
MUST keep ScreenContainer gradient header + negative margin pattern
Budget data MUST come from existing localDB tables

softConstraints.rule: PREFER extending AIInputModal.draftCard style over full rewrite
Receipt edge effect: use View + borderRadius, avoid images
Progress bar animation: use Animated.spring() for bounce
Number update animation: use Animated.timing() + interpolate

hudLocation.note: This screen becomes the new HUD screen

dependencies.description: HUD needs budget vs actual data
dependencies.action: may need to add budget query

dependencies.description: Real-time HUD update after transaction save

successCriteria: VSC-01: Receipt card has visible edge effects
VSC-04: Edit mode shows gray background
VSC-07: Progress bar color logic correct
VSC-08: Progress bar has bounce animation
VSC-09: No Toast on transaction submit
VSC-10: HUD numbers animate on update
